roles.name: Tlamatini (Sage of the Codex)
roles.description: Knower of the painted books — designs the over-arching Salesforce solution and watches over its harmony with the cosmos.

roles.name: Tlatoani of Delivery
roles.description: Speaker-King of the project — marshals warriors of delivery, holds the calendar stone, and answers to the council.

roles.name: Keeper of the Amoxtli
roles.description: Steward of the painted records — guardian of layouts, fields and permission sets in the great library.

roles.name: Obsidian Smith of Tenochtitlan
roles.description: Forges Apex, LWC, and platform features as one knaps obsidian into macuahuitl blades.

roles.name: High Priest of the Templo Mayor
roles.description: Captain over all Salesforce craft — sets standards from atop the great pyramid and guides the senior smiths.

roles.name: Eagle Warrior of the Codex
roles.description: Veteran of many campaigns — patrols the borders of customer requirements with the practiced eye of the cuauhtli.

roles.name: Jaguar Scout of the Marches
roles.description: Carries discovery and configuration across the realm under the Eagle Warrior's eye, swift and silent as the ocelotl.

roles.name: Causeway Master of Tlatelolco
roles.description: Architect of the great causeways spanning lake and city — joins Salesforce to the realms beyond.

roles.name: Causeway Builder of Iztapalapa
roles.description: Lays the stones of API, middleware, and event flows under the Causeway Master's plan.

roles.name: Apprentice Causeway Builder
roles.description: Learns the craft of integration — webhooks, batch, callouts and the Mexica patterns of error handling.

roles.name: Healer of the Houses of Pulque
roles.description: Tends the wounded build and the weary deploy — finds the maladies before they reach the tlatoani.

roles.name: Herald of the Banners
roles.description: Lifts the standard and the conch trumpet for product and message — leads all marketing craft.

roles.name: Conch-Bearer of the Plaza
roles.description: Strategist of campaigns — sounds the call across the Zócalo to gather and convert.

roles.name: Banner-Bearer of the Causeway
roles.description: Carries the campaign forward into the field — content, creative, and the daily march.

roles.name: Council Scribe of the Calmecac
roles.description: Records what is needed and what is promised — translates between mortal Customer and the priestly craft of design.

roles.name: Master Carver of the Sun Stone
roles.description: Senior smith of the western pyramid — chisels the most intricate Apex glyphs and mentors the obsidian smiths.

roles.name: Telpochcalli Initiate
roles.description: Youth of the house of learning — cuts their first stones of configuration under the Jaguar Scout's tutelage.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2-3 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

realms.projectName: Creator & Sun Gods — Cosmogenesis CRM Rollout
Mortal Rulers & Priests — Triple Alliance Analytics

creator-and-sun-gods.themedRole: High Priest of the Templo Mayor
Master Carver of the Sun Stone

agriculture-fertility-gods.themedRole: Healer of the Houses of Pulque
High Priest of the Templo Mayor

underworld-and-death.themedRole: High Priest of the Templo Mayor

mortal-rulers-and-priests.themedRole: High Priest of the Templo Mayor
Master Carver of the Sun Stone

creator-and-sun-gods.name: Council at Omeyocan
creator-and-sun-gods.description: Discovery sign-off — the dual creator approves the cosmos blueprint.

creator-and-sun-gods.name: Lighting the New Fire
creator-and-sun-gods.description: Build kickoff: the New Fire ceremony binds the next 52-year cycle.

creator-and-sun-gods.name: Audience at Teotihuacan
creator-and-sun-gods.description: Mid-project gate: the gods convene atop the Pyramid of the Sun.

creator-and-sun-gods.name: Sacrifice of Nanahuatzin
creator-and-sun-gods.description: Phase invoice trigger: the humble god leaps into the bonfire and becomes the Fifth Sun.

creator-and-sun-gods.name: Birth of the Fifth Sun
creator-and-sun-gods.description: Go-Live: Tonatiuh rises and begins his march across the heavens.

creator-and-sun-gods.name: Quetzalcoatl's Hand-off
creator-and-sun-gods.description: Hyper-care close: the Feathered Serpent departs east, leaving stewardship to the priesthood.

agriculture-fertility-gods.name: Muster at Tlalocan
agriculture-fertility-gods.description: Project kickoff: the Tlaloque assemble in the paradise of rain.

agriculture-fertility-gods.name: First Rains of the Season
agriculture-fertility-gods.description: Build phase: storms deployed across the chinampas.

agriculture-fertility-gods.name: Maize Harvest UAT
agriculture-fertility-gods.description: UAT gate: Centeotl certifies the yield.

agriculture-fertility-gods.name: Festival of Xochiquetzal
agriculture-fertility-gods.description: Go-Live: flower-crowned celebration in every chinampa.

agriculture-fertility-gods.name: Return to the Underworld
agriculture-fertility-gods.description: Hyper-care close: the rain gods retreat for the dry season.

agriculture-fertility-gods.name: Tribute of Pulque
agriculture-fertility-gods.description: Final invoice: jars of pulque rendered from Mayahuel's harvest.

underworld-and-death.name: The Bone Gate Opens
underworld-and-death.description: Discovery: surveillance plane online across the nine layers.

underworld-and-death.name: Forge the Obsidian Mirrors
underworld-and-death.description: Build: the Tezcatlipoca mirror network deployed.

underworld-and-death.name: Mictlantecuhtli's Audit
underworld-and-death.description: Solution review with the Lord of the Dead himself.

underworld-and-death.name: Mictlan Activation
underworld-and-death.description: Go-Live: the underworld pipeline fully operational.

underworld-and-death.name: Souls Pass Through
underworld-and-death.description: Project close: four years of soul migration scheduled.

underworld-and-death.name: Final Reckoning of Bones
underworld-and-death.description: Final invoice from the bone palace.

mortal-rulers-and-priests.name: Council of Nezahualcoyotl
mortal-rulers-and-priests.description: Kickoff council in Texcoco's poet-king's court.

mortal-rulers-and-priests.name: Gaze into the Codex
mortal-rulers-and-priests.description: Discovery: reports modelled from the Codex Mendoza tribute rolls.

mortal-rulers-and-priests.name: Crowning at Templo Mayor
mortal-rulers-and-priests.description: UAT acceptance: the new Tlatoani ascends the great pyramid.

mortal-rulers-and-priests.name: Triumph of the Triple Alliance
mortal-rulers-and-priests.description: Go-Live + handoff: Tenochtitlan, Texcoco and Tlacopan share the spoils.

mortal-rulers-and-priests.name: Tribute Day Recompense
mortal-rulers-and-priests.description: Final invoice from the Cihuacoatl's treasury.

Quetzalcoatl.notes: Self-imposed exile — sailing east on a raft of serpents.

Tezcatlipoca.notes: Walking the night as a jaguar — cannot be reached.

Huitzilopochtli.notes: Daily war with the moon and stars — ceremonial recovery.

Nanahuatzin.notes: Recovery from the bonfire — convalescence at Teotihuacan.

Tlaloc.notes: Storm-brewing retreat in the eastern mountains.

Coatlicue.notes: Pilgrimage to Coatepec — the serpent mountain.

Mictlantecuhtli.notes: Bone palace renovation — closed to visitors.

Mictecacihuatl.notes: Día de los Muertos preparations — annual.

Coyolxauhqui.notes: Reassembly at the foot of Templo Mayor.

Moctezuma II.notes: Royal hunt at Chapultepec — birds and ocelotl.

Tlacaelel.notes: Rewriting the histories — quarterly codex revision.

La Malinche.notes: Translation duty in Cholula — diplomatic mission.
